agreement.full_name: Preferential Trade Agreement among D-8 Member States

notes_before_sheets: CONFIRMED per Schema Companion Guide's named special case #5: 'D-8 PTA - per-member differing years and non-implementers.' Each member sheet below has its OWN set of staging years (confirmed by direct inspection, NOT assumed) and Bangladesh/Iran use a SINGLE standing rate (no year columns at all) rather than phased. Egypt and Nigeria are D-8 members but have NO tariff sheet in this workbook at all — confirmed by their absence from the sheet list — matching the Schema Companion Guide's description of them as 'not yet implemented' (agreement_members.status='not_implemented' for those two, added via Step 6's reference-data loading, with NO fabricated tariff_lines rows for them).

tariff_sheets._note: No year columns - single Preferential_Rate column confirmed, matches doc's 'single rate' member description.

CORRECTED from earlier assumption of 2024-2027 (4 years) - direct inspection confirms only 3 year columns present: 2025, 2026, 2027 (F,G,H), with remarks/source shifted to columns I/J accordingly. Earlier '2024-27' figure was from the Schema Companion Guide's summary text and does not match this file's actual columns - the FILE is the source of truth here, guide text may be describing implementation-status language rather than literal column count.

columns._extra_note: Column E is 'Unit' - no direct schema field, similar open question as other modules' unit columns.

notes: Every sheet also has column D 'HS_Version_Basis' (free text explaining the HS revision/source basis per member, e.g. 'HS 2012; source columns show 2013-2016 instalments') - FLAGGED, candidate for a notes/remarks-append field, not yet decided. Column Z 'SearchKey' present on every sheet is confirmed to be an Excel search-helper column (holds the same HS digits with no formatting) - correctly excluded from all column mappings above per the same rule applied to PTN's helper columns. Egypt and Nigeria: per Loader Spec's D-8 handling, these should still get agreement_members rows with status='not_implemented' during Step 6, even though they have no config entry here (they have no workbook sheet to read from).
